data.content:
1. `scripts/model-picker.sh:160-202` never maps digit keys to menu selection. `Enter` commits the highlighted row and arrows move the cursor, but every printable character, including `1`-`9`, is appended to `query`, so the acceptance criterion requiring selection via number/arrow keys is not met.
2. The added tests only exercise `_model_picker_filter` and the threshold constant (`scripts/test-model-picker.sh:34-167`, `src/lib/__tests__/model-picker-filter.test.ts:14-101`). They do not drive `_model_search_pick_one` / `_model_search_pick` through a PTY to cover real-time filtering, backspace or Esc clearing, arrow navigation, or numeric selection, so the required interactive behavior is not actually verified.
Validation summary: `bash scripts/test-model-picker.sh`, targeted `vitest` for `src/lib/__tests__/model-picker-filter.test.ts`, `eslint .`, and `tsc --noEmit` passed in an isolated branch snapshot. The full unit suite still hits an unrelated existing sandbox failure in `src/lib/__tests__/app-update.test.ts`, and `next build` could not be validated from the archive snapshot because Turbopack rejects a symlinked `node_modules`.
